products.name: Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set
products.description: 2026 New Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set, Short Sleeve Athletic T-Shirt + 2-in-1 Double Layer Running Shorts, Breathable Lightweight Training Sportswear for Gym Running Swimming Beach

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text: This men’s athletic 2-piece sport set includes a quick-dry short sleeve t-shirt and double layer running shorts, designed for all kinds of sports and summer daily use. The top adopts breathable quick-dry polyester fabric, effectively pulls sweat away from skin surface and speeds up air drying, lightweight without sticky feeling after sweating. Crew neck and stretch short sleeves bring zero restraint for arm movements. The matching shorts feature a practical double-layer structure. The inner compression liner offers supportive fit and avoids see-through or chafing; the outer loose layer comes with adjustable drawstring elastic waistband, convenient to tighten or loosen as you like. Side split design greatly boosts mobility during running, jumping and strength training. Minimal brand logo decoration on chest and shorts hem, simple stylish solid black design.

aplus.heading: Prodcut Features
items: Premium Quick Dry Fabric: Made of high-quality polyester blend with spandex, ultra lightweight, moisture-wicking and sweat evaporates rapidly, keep you cool and dry during all workouts.

2-in-1 Double Layer Shorts Design: Built-in tight compression liner prevents rubbing and private exposure; outer loose short layer with drawstring elastic waist for adjustable fit, side split hem for unrestricted movement.
Comfortable Athletic Short Sleeve Tee: Crew neck, raglan short sleeves, smooth stretch fabric, classic minimalist logo print, no tight binding, suitable for long-time gym, running and training.

Multi-Scenario Sportswear Suit: Perfect for gym training, jogging, running, swimming, beach, fitness, cycling, hiking and daily casual wear; ideal as workout set, swim trunks set and summer athletic outfit.
Multiple Sizes Available: L / XL / XXL / XXXL / XXXXL to fit weight range 42.5kg - 90.5kg, elastic fabric fits most body types, black solid color easy to match all gear.

aplus.heading: Fabric Composition
aplus.text: Main Fabric: Polyester + Spandex, high elasticity, wrinkle resistant, fade resistant, durable for frequent washing. Function: Quick dry, moisture wicking, breathable, stretch, lightweight. L: Fit weight 42.5 – 52.5 KG ; XL: Fit weight 52.5 – 62.5 KG ;  XXL: Fit weight 62.5 – 72.5 KG ;  XXXL: Fit weight 72.5 – 82.5 KG ;  XXXXL: Fit weight 82.5 – 90.5 KG;

aplus.heading: Applicable Occasions
aplus.text: Gym fitness, running, jogging, swimming, beach, cycling, hiking, basketball training, daily casual loungewear. Men Quick Dry Sport Suit Short Sleeve T-shirt Double Layer Running Shorts 2 Pieces Athletic Gym Training Set. men workout set, quick dry running suit, 2 in 1 double layer shorts, athletic short sleeve tee, gym training tracksuit, mens swim shorts set, breathable sportswear, lightweight fitness outfit, jogging suit for men, moisture wicking training clothes

products.name: Islamic Women Modest Burkini Swimsuit
products.description: Women Modest Burkini Swimsuit, Long Sleeve Zipper Two Piece Rash Guard, Tropical Print Full Coverage Leggings Conservative Islamic Swimwear for Beach Surfing

aplus.heading: Fabric Advantage
aplus.text:
82% Nylon + 18% Spandex professional swim fabric:
UPF50+ sun protection, anti-UV long sleeve design
Quick-dry & moisture-wicking, no water retention
High stretch & recovery, not easy to loose after stretching
Resist chlorine and seawater corrosion, long service life
No pilling, no color fading after multiple washes

aplus.heading: Product Overview
aplus.text:
This women’s modest two-piece burkini swimwear is specially designed for customers who prefer full coverage swimwear, especially Muslim women in the Middle East market. The set combines a long sleeve zip-up rash guard tunic top and matching full-length swim leggings, mixing solid color main body with tropical floral printed sleeves and hem for a unique fashion look, available in 2 classic color schemes.
Design Details
Top: Stand collar with half-length front zipper, easy to adjust tightness; long sleeves with tropical plant print; asymmetrical layered peplum hem to cover abdomen and hips, visually slim figure.
Bottom: High-waisted full-length stretch swim leggings, full leg coverage, elastic waist for all body shapes, no rolling down during movement.
Craftsmanship: Flat lock stitching to reduce skin friction, seamless inner layer for comfortable long-time wear.

aplus.heading: Applicable Occasions
aplus.text:
Black base with pink & green tropical flower print sleeves
Navy blue base with palm leaf print sleeves

aplus.heading: Product Features
aplus.text:
Full Coverage Modest Islamic Design
Two-piece modest burkini set includes long sleeve zip-front tunic top & full-length swim leggings. Mid-front half zipper for easy on/off, layered peplum hem hides belly and hips, meets Middle East Muslim modest dressing demands while stylish. Two tropical print color options: black floral & navy palm leaf print.
UPF 50+ UV Protection Long Sleeve Rash Guard
Long sleeve full arm coverage blocks harmful sun rays, professional surfing rash guard fabric prevents chafing during swimming, snorkeling and beach volleyball. Stretchy long pants fully cover legs without tight binding.
Premium Quick-Dry Swim Fabric
Crafted from 82% Nylon + 18% Spandex blend. Ultra high elasticity, soft skin-friendly, chlorine & salt water resistant. Fast moisture-wicking, dries quickly after water activities, no sticky heavy feeling. Fade-resistant, no deformation after repeated washing.
Functional Half-Zip Front & Flattering Fit
Half zipper stand collar allows adjustable ventilation; asymmetric peplum hem optimizes body curve, hides tummy and hip flaws. High waist full-length leggings offer supportive fit, won’t slide down during sports. Contrast tropical floral printed sleeves & hem add fashion sense to solid color main body.
Multi-Scenario Versatile Swimwear
Perfect for Muslim ladies, modest wearers, swimming, surfing, snorkeling, beach holiday, hot spring and pool training. Suitable for Middle East, Southeast Asia market demand for full coverage swimsuits.

products.name: Mini Cute Flap Square Crossbody Bag

Cute tiny flap handbag for women, fits all your small essentials, hand/shoulder/crossbody 3 ways to wear, perfect daily fashion accessory.

aplus.heading: Product Description
aplus.text:
Retro Glossy Mini Flap Square Handbag
Our new arrival women small square bag is launched in Spring 2026, combining classic patent leather texture and minimalist square silhouette, a must-have trendy accessory for modern ladies.
Made of high-quality soft synthetic patent leather, the bag features fine stitched seam craft as popular decorative element. The inner lining adopts durable polyester fabric, and the overall weight is only 0.1kg, super lightweight without pressing your shoulder.
This mini purse comes with dual carry accessories: a short handheld top handle and a 110cm long adjustable shoulder strap, you can freely switch between hand carry, single shoulder and crossbody styles according to your dressing look.
The flap cover closure design effectively protects your private items, with built-in inner patch pocket and zipper interlayer pocket to classify your lipstick, bank cards, keys and small change.
Four timeless glossy colors including red, dark green, black and gray are optional, easy to collocate with all your daily outfits. Perfect for daily shopping, casual dating, short walk and daily commute.

products.name: In-Ear Sleep Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds V6.0
products.description: In-Ear Sleep Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds V6.0, Soft Silent Sleep Headphones with AAC/SBC Audio Decoding, Small Noise Isolating Sleeping Earphones for Side Sleeper

aplus.heading: Full Set of Accessories
aplus.text:
1 × S16 Sleep Earbuds Charging Case
1 Pair S16 Wireless Earbuds
3 Pairs Replacement Silicone Ear Tips
1 × Type-C Charging Cable
1 × User Instruction Manual

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
😴 Ultra-Soft Ergonomic Sleep Design for Side Sleepers
Curved wingtip silicone eartips fit snugly inside ear canal, low-profile tiny shape won’t press ears when lying on side. Comes with 3 pairs of replaceable soft ear caps to fit different ear sizes, zero discomfort for all-night sleeping.
📶 Stable Bluetooth V6.0 Connection, 10M Wide Range
Adopts upgraded Bluetooth 6.0 chip, faster pairing and anti-interference signal, stable connection within 10 meters. Supports full Bluetooth protocols for smooth music playback, call answering and audio control.
🎵 Hi-Fi Clear Sound with AAC & SBC Dual Decoding
Dual audio decoding technology restores rich sound details, delivers soft balanced audio for white noise, podcasts, meditation music and bedtime audiobooks. Effectively isolate ambient snoring and room noise.
🔋 Long Lasting Battery Life
Single earbud built-in 30mAh battery, charging case with 230mAh storage. Compact pocket-sized case (5541.528mm) with Type-C charging cable included, easy to carry for travel, nap and overnight sleep.
Complete Accessory Package & Safe Certified
Package includes S16 earbuds, charging case, Type-C charging cord, user manual and extra replacement silicone ear tips. Complies with GB 4943.1-2022 safety standard, reliable daily use.

aplus.heading: Specification Summary
aplus.text:
Brand: SOBAST
Model: S16 Sleep Earbuds
Bluetooth Version: V6.0
Bluetooth Distance: 10 Meters
Earbud Battery: 30mAh; Charging Case Battery: 230mAh
Input: DC 5V
Supported Codec: AAC, SBC
Compliance Standard: GB 4943.1-2022

aplus.heading: Product Description
items:
Comfortable Side-Sleep Friendly Shape
Different from ordinary protruding earbuds, this mini in-ear headphone features a slim hidden design with flexible silicone wings. It stays deep inside your ear without sticking out, so you can lie on your side all night without painful pressure. 3 sizes of spare ear tips are included to match small, medium and large ear canals for all-day soft wearing.

Advanced Bluetooth 6.0 Smooth Connection
Equipped with Bluetooth V6.0 chip, it pairs instantly with smartphones, tablets and laptops. The maximum transmission distance reaches 10 meters, no stuttering when you walk around your bedroom. It fully supports mainstream Bluetooth protocols, supporting hands-free calls, volume adjustment and track switching.

High-Quality AAC & SBC Audio Decoding
Dual audio decoding brings lossless sound performance. Whether you play relaxing white noise, sleep music, meditation podcasts or bedtime stories, the earbuds output mellow, clear sound while blocking outside disturbing noise for a quiet sleeping environment.

Portable & Long-Endurance Battery
Each earbud has a 30mAh built-in battery, matched with a 230mAh compact charging case measuring only 5541.528mm, light enough to slip into pockets and handbags. The package is equipped with a Type-C charging cable for fast, convenient power replenishment.

aplus.heading: Wireless Sleep Earbuds – Ideal Headphones for Side Sleepers
aplus.text: If you are troubled by snoring, noisy room or want to listen to bedtime audio without bulky headsets, our S16 sleep earbuds are your perfect choice.

products.name: 6-Cavity Train Silicone Baking Mold
products.description: 6 Cavity Train Silicone Cake Mold, Food Grade Silicone Chocolate Jelly Baking Tray, FDA Approved DIY Cartoon Train Baking Tool for Kids Party, Oven Microwave Safe

aplus.heading: Specifications
aplus.text:
Model: JSC1800
Material: Food-Grade Silicone (FDA Approved)
Cavity Count: 6 Cartoon Train Shapes
Dimensions: 30 × 17.5 × 4 cm
Net Weight: 145g
Temperature Range: -40℃ ~ 230℃
Applicable Appliances: Oven, Microwave, Roaster, Refrigerator
Suitable For: Mini cake, chocolate, jelly, candy, ice cube, handmade soap

aplus.heading: Cartoon Train Silicone Baking Mold for DIY Homemade Treats
items: This 6-cavity train silicone mold is a fun baking accessory for home bakers and parents. Adorable locomotive and carriage shapes create eye-catching mini desserts to delight children at birthday parties, baby showers and daily snacks.

Made of high-standard food-grade silicone certified by FDA, the mold is safe, non-toxic and environmentally friendly. It supports a wide working temperature range of -40℃ ~ 230℃, working great in ovens, microwaves and refrigerators for cakes, chocolate, jelly, candy, ice cubes and handmade soap.

The soft flexible silicone enables effortless non-stick demolding. After baking, leave the mold to cool for about 10 minutes before taking out desserts for intact perfect shapes. It is reusable and will not deform or fade after long-term repeated use. Cleaning is simple: flip the mold inside out and wash with neutral detergent, either by hand or in a dishwasher.
Compact size 30*17.5*4cm with a lightweight 145g body, built-in hanging hole for convenient storage when not in use.

aplus.heading: Bullet Points
aplus.text:
🚂 Cute 6-Cavity Cartoon Train Shape
Features 6 individual mini train cavities, lovely locomotive & carriage design, perfect for kid’s birthday party, baby shower desserts, homemade chocolate, jelly, mini cakes and handmade soap.
✅ FDA Certified Premium Food-Grade Silicone
Passed US FDA food safety inspection, non-toxic, odorless, eco-friendly material, safe for direct food contact, no harmful substance release under normal baking temperature.
🔥 Wide Temperature Resistance & Multi-Scene Use
Heat resistant from -40°C up to 230°C, compatible with oven, microwave oven and roaster. Ideal for baking, freezing, making cold jelly and ice cubes.
⚠️ Note: Do not use microwave Crisp mode.
🧼 Easy Demold & Dishwasher Safe
Flexible silicone construction, just twist gently after cooling to pop out food perfectly without sticking. Reusable, no deformation or fading after repeated use; can be cleaned in dishwasher or warm soapy water.
🛡️ Durable & User-Friendly Design
Equipped with hanging hole for easy storage; flexible but sturdy structure. Avoid sharp cutters, steel wool scrubbers and direct open flame contact to extend service life.

aplus.heading: Instructions & Warnings
aplus.text:
Keep away from open flame and heating tubes of ovens; place the mold on the middle or upper rack, at least 5cm distance from heating elements.
Clean with neutral detergent, sponge or dishwasher; flip the mold inside out for deeper cleaning.
Do NOT use the Crisp mode of microwave ovens.
Do NOT scrub with steel wool or sharp hard tools to prevent scratches.
Let the mold cool down for about 10 minutes after baking before demolding for better effect.
Proper operation can effectively extend the service life of the silicone mold.
Do NOT scratch the surface with sharp objects.
